name: Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement
description: Give your furry friend a little boost with Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement. This liquid dietary supplement provides iron, copper and five essential vitamins for those pets that may not be getting complete nutrition. Easily dispensed, the 1 oz. size comes with a dropper for convenience. Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement is meat-flavored for a taste your paw-tner will enjoy.
